description_long: This is a two-story suburban house set within a rectangular fenced lot, featuring a manicured front yard with two trees and a short walkway leading to the main entrance. The house has a simple, boxy structure with a gable roof and symmetrical window placement on both floors. Attached to the side is a covered carport with two parked cars, and a driveway leading to the street. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture, a swimming pool, and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. The property is surrounded by a tall hedge or fence, giving it a sense of enclosure and separation from neighboring lots. The overall design is practical and modern, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a carport, and a fenced yard featuring a pool and patio. The property is landscaped with trees and hedges for privacy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two trees in the front yard, and the carport with two cars on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, backyard patio, and swimming pool, with the house's gable roof visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pool, patio furniture, and mature trees, as well as the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, the fenced yard, and the pool area with dense greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small set of steps, flanked by two trees and a short walkway, no porch or columns.
